preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Wait for the Home page to complete loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads the Home page successfully in guest state without requiring authentication, and the browser URL remains http://localhost/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled and interactive in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Inspect the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button.
Verify each button is enabled and can receive click interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, interactive, and available for guest-state navigation.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login page URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates guest user to the customer-search workflow entry URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Customer signup button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates guest user to the vehicle-survey workflow entry URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Clean survey button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates guest user to the survey workflow entry URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Site survey button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains survey?data.
